title: astragalus cisoxanus
intro: Astragalus cisoxanus, also known as the Xinjiang milkvetch, is a type of plant that belongs to the legume family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus cisoxanus include improving immune function, reducing fatigue and stress, and potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Astragalus cisoxanus can be prepared into various herbal products, such as capsules, tablets, and teas, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
